channel.title: ByteBeam SFDA — Tools & Pharma RA Insights
channel.description: AI agents for SFDA pharma regulatory work — SmPC and PIL generation, Arabic translation, dossier gap analysis — plus authoritative guides for in-house RA, PV, and CMC teams.

item.title: SFDA SmPC & PIL Generator
item.description: Generate SFDA-aligned English SmPC and PIL drafts from originator documents. Module 1.3-ready, editable DOCX output, built for KSA submissions.

item.title: SFDA Arabic SmPC & PIL Translator
item.description: Translate SmPC and PIL to Arabic for SFDA submission. Regulatory-aware phrasing, RTL formatting, Saudi-specific terminology, editable DOCX out.

item.title: SFDA Dossier Gap Analysis
item.description: Pre-submission gap analysis for SFDA SmPC and PIL packs. Catches labelling, translation, and section-completeness gaps. Severity-ranked report.

item.title: SFDA Pharmacovigilance & QPPV Requirements: A Practical Guide for In-House Teams in 2026
item.description: SFDA pharmacovigilance for in-house RA/PV teams: QPPV qualifications, PSSF, ICSR/PSUR/RMP cycles, and where automation actually helps in 2026.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi

item.title: SFDA Variations Decision Guide: Type IA, IB, II — A Practical Reference for In-House RA Teams
item.description: How SFDA classifies post-approval variations under Guidelines v6.3, when to use Type IA / IA(IN) / IB / II, and where the work is automatable.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi

item.title: SFDA eCTD Submission Format: Module 1 Regional Requirements & Common RFIs in 2026
item.description: How SFDA submissions work in eCTD: GCC Module 1 specification, module content, what triggers RFIs, and where in-house teams should focus automation.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi

item.title: SFDA Drug Master File (DMF) and Letter of Access: A Practical Guide for API Manufacturers and MAHs
item.description: How DMFs are submitted to SFDA, how the Letter of Access works, what the open and restricted parts contain, and where API manufacturers lose review time.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi

item.title: Impurity Profile for SFDA Drug Submissions: ICH Q3A, Q3B, Q3D, and M7 in Practice
item.description: Build a defensible impurity profile for SFDA submissions: ICH Q3A/B thresholds, Q3D elemental impurities, and M7 mutagenic-impurity assessment.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi

item.title: SFDA Drug Registration Guide Saudi Arabia: Complete 2026 Process
item.description: Navigate SFDA drug registration in Saudi Arabia. Complete guide covering CTD requirements, GMP certification, pricing approval, and timeline for 2026.
item.author: Talal Bazerbachi
